steps.title: Set up the percentage formula
steps.content:
To find the percentage of jumbo-size binder clips, use:
percentage = $$\frac{\text{part}}{\text{whole}} \times 100 = \frac{308,000}{400,000} \times 100$$

steps.title: Simplify and calculate
steps.content:
Cancel three zeros from both numerator and denominator:
$$\frac{308,000}{400,000} = \frac{308}{400}$$
Next, divide both by 4:
$$\frac{308}{400} = \frac{77}{100} = 77\%$$
D is correct.
